title: Harry warns of 'deeply troubling' rise in antisemitism in UK
description: The Duke of Sussex says "legitimate protest" is important but people must be more "clear" about where they are aiming their anger.
content:
The Duke of Sussex has warned of a "deeply troubling" rise in antisemitism in the UK which has led to "lethal violence" against the Jewish community.
Acknowledging the importance of "legitimate protest" against the actions of a state, Prince Harry sa... [2470 chars]

title: Hezbollah support endures in south Lebanon as ceasefire fails to stop war with Israel
description: Despite continuing Israeli attacks and occupation, many people in the south still believe the armed group is the only force capable of defending them.
content: Last Saturday an Israeli air strike, at lunchtime and without warning, destroyed a building where a family displaced by the war were sheltering in a town in southern Lebanon called Saksakiyeh. A ceasefire, announced last month, has failed to stop the... [9219 chars]

title: Warning higher Europe air fares 'inevitable' due to Iran war
description: Flying by air will get more expensive as oil prices remain high, says international industry body boss.
content:
Higher ticket prices for air travellers in Europe are "inevitable" because of the high cost of jet fuel, according to the head of the International Air Transport Association.
Although some airlines have cut their European fares recently because of a ... [1892 chars]

title: Housing market in England and Wales weakening due to Iran war, say estate agents
description: Homebuyers more cautious due to possible mortgage rate rises and higher inflation as sellers sit on properties
content:
Fears of higher mortgage rates and rising inflation as a result of the Middle East conflict are leading to a subdued and downbeat housing market, according to estate agents.
Demand from potential homebuyers across England and Wales has shown a “notic... [3237 chars]

title: Why big tech is betting on cute mascots
description: The likes of Apple, Microsoft and Google are all putting cartoon characters centre stage.
content:
Some of the world's biggest and most powerful brands are attempting to be more cute and cuddly.
